items.title: SEC filing: DFAN14A — Fermi Inc. (DEFINITIVE ADDITIONAL MATERIALS)
items.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer and other participants, including Vicksburg Investments Management LLC and Melissa A. Neugebauer 2020 Trust, have filed a definitive proxy statement to solicit agent designations for calling a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders. Neugebauer beneficially owns 146,516,035 shares of Fermi's common stock, while the other participants do not own any shares. The filing advises shareholders to read the definitive proxy statement and other proxy materials for important information regarding the solicitation.

items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, co-founder and largest individual shareholder of Fermi America, Inc., has proposed a town hall webinar for June 30th where he, Governor Rick Perry, and other parties will answer questions from analysts and journalists about the company's past, present, and future. Neugebauer is seeking to give shareholders a say in the company's direction, particularly regarding Project Matador, a 7,500-acre private power campus in Texas, and whether to pursue a strategic dual-track process to maximize shareholder value. The proposed webinar comes after Governor Perry and the board gave themselves a 70% supermajority vote threshold, making it difficult for shareholders to change course.

items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, co-founder and largest individual shareholder of Fermi Inc., has issued a press release and letter to shareholders expressing confidence that a tenant deal will be announced soon and calling for a Special Meeting of Shareholders to restore normal governance and evaluate all potential strategic transactions. Neugebauer and other participants are soliciting agent designations to call the Special Meeting, where shareholders can vote on Board composition and potentially elect new, independent board nominees. The move is seen as an effort to maximize shareholder value and ensure that all strategic alternatives are honestly evaluated, amid concerns about the current Board's gov

items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer and affiliated entities have filed a definitive proxy statement with the SEC in connection with soliciting agent designations for a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders. Neugebauer beneficially owns 146,516,035 shares of Fermi's common stock, and the filing advises all shareholders to read the proxy statement and other materials because they contain important information. The special meeting is to be held as promptly as practicable, although a specific date is not disclosed.

items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., has issued a press release responding to recent media inquiries and SEC filings, calling on the Fermi Board to maximize shareholder value and find a new leader to replace the nine senior leaders who departed after his termination. Neugebauer highlights his team's accomplishments during his tenure, including securing a 99-year ground lease and over $1 billion in financing facilities, and emphasizes the need for transparency and accountability in determining Fermi's future. The press release comes after significant positive stock momentum in response to Neugebauer's recent open letter, which outlined a dual path of tenant ac

items.title: SEC filing: DEFA14A — Fermi Inc. (SOLICITING MATERIAL PURSUANT TO SECTION 240.14A-12)
items.formExplanation: Additional definitive proxy material from the company — its side of an ongoing solicitation (responses, letters to shareholders, talking points).
items.summary: Fermi Inc is urging shareholders to sign and return the WHITE Consent Revocation Card in response to former CEO Toby Neugebauer's consent solicitation to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders, citing Neugebauer's pattern of false claims and inaccurate statements. Neugebauer is seeking to replace the Board and leadership team with his own nominees, which Fermi's Board believes would jeopardize shareholder value and benefit Neugebauer and his affiliates at the expense of other shareholders. The company is highlighting its commercial momentum and progress under new management, and warning shareholders not to sign or return any GREEN Consent Cards sent by Neugebauer.

items.summary: Toby Neugebauer and his affiliated entities, collectively known as the Fermi Founder Parties, are soliciting shareholders to designate agents to call a special meeting of Fermi Inc. shareholders, and are providing additional information to street name shareholders on how to vote their shares. The Fermi Founder Parties, who beneficially own approximately 146.5 million shares of Fermi Inc. common stock, are seeking to call a special meeting to allow shareholders to hear proposals and make informed decisions. Shareholders who own shares through a bank, broker, or other nominee are encouraged to check their email and/or mailbox for solicitation materials and vote their GREEN voting instruction f

items.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, along with other participants, has issued a press release reaffirming his support for John Sellers of Double Eagle as Chairman and CEO of Fermi, citing the need for enhanced accountability and credibility to prevent value destruction by the current Board and management team. Neugebauer claims that the current Board has failed to replace nine key senior executives who departed Fermi after his termination and has ignored proposals from large companies that could offer greater value to shareholders. The release also highlights Neugebauer's intent to continue his campaign to seat a new, strong, independent Board and restore Fermi's position as a pro-shareholder REIT.

items.title: SEC filing: DEFA14A — Fermi Inc. (SOLICITING MATERIAL PURSUANT TO SECTION 240.14A-12)
items.formExplanation: Additional definitive proxy material from the company — its side of an ongoing solicitation (responses, letters to shareholders, talking points).
items.summary: Fermi Inc is mailing a Consent Revocation Statement to shareholders in response to a consent solicitation by former CEO Toby Neugebauer, who is seeking to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders. The company's Board of Directors urges shareholders to sign and return the WHITE Consent Revocation Card to protect their investment and support the company's continued execution of its Fermi 2.0 strategy. Neugebauer, who was terminated for cause, currently does not have the required support to call a Special Meeting, and the company emphasizes that it is making progress on its projects, including Project Matador, and is focused on maximizing long-term shareholder value.

items.title: SEC filing: DFAN14A — Fermi Inc. (SOLICITING MATERIAL PURSUANT TO 240.14A-12A)
items.formExplanation: Proxy-fight material from a non-management participant — solicitation filings made outside the company's own proxy (in a control contest, each side's letters and presentations land here).
items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, the co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., has filed definitive proxy solicitation materials to call a Special Meeting of Shareholders to elect a new Board majority committed to taking all actions to benefit shareholders. Neugebauer is seeking to replace the current Board with six independent directors who have no ties to the Neugebauer family or existing board dynamics, in order to consider a full-value strategic review and potential sale of the company. Shareholders of record as of June 10, 2026, are being asked to sign and return a GREEN agent designation card to support the call for the Special Meeting.

The participants, who collectively own a significant portion of Fermi Inc.'s common stock, with Toby R. Neugebauer beneficially owning 139,016,035 shares, are advising all shareholders to read the definitive proxy statement and other proxy materials as they become available. The solicitation is related to the filing of a definitive proxy statement on Schedule 14A and accompanying green agent designations card with the SEC.

items.title: SEC filing: PRRN14A — Fermi Inc. (REVISED PRELIMINARY CONSENT STATEMENT)
items.formExplanation: Revised preliminary proxy material from a non-management participant — a dissident group's updated draft solicitation.
items.summary: Toby R. Neugebauer, co-founder of Fermi Inc., is soliciting shareholder support to call a special meeting to vote on expanding the board of directors and electing seven new candidates, including himself, and removing three current directors. The proposed changes aim to install a new board majority that would consider a potential sale or strategic partnership of the company, which Neugebauer believes could maximize value for shareholders. Neugebauer's effort is a second attempt to provide shareholders with a vote on the company's future after his initial attempt was obstructed by the company.

items.title: Fermi America Tells Texas Lawmakers Project Matador Will Push the Frontier of AI Compute While Setting a New Standard for Water Stewardship - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) (LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ ("Fermi" or the "Company"), today underscored its commitment to responsible...
items.excerpt: AUSTIN, Texas , June 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI ) (LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ ("Fermi" or the "Company"), today underscored its commitment to responsible environmental stewardship as Chief Site Development Officer Charlie Hamilton testified before the Texas House Natural Resources Committee at an interim hearing examining data center water use and conservation. Hamilton outlined how Project Matador, the company's HyperGrid campus rising in the Texas Panhandle, is being engineered to meet the demands of the AI economy while protecting the region's most precious resource. Speaking to lawmakers, Hamilton framed water stewardship as a personal and generational

items.title: Fermi Inc. Announces "Fermi 2.0" Strategic Evolution, New Board Chairman, Leadership Transitions, and New Office Locations - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi" or the "Company") today announced a series of strategic and leadership initiatives under a new phase of the Company
items.excerpt: Affirms Ongoing Commitment to Project Matador Buildout, Texas Tech Partnership and Serving America's Energy Needs DALLAS , April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi" or the "Company") today announced a series of strategic and leadership initiatives under a new phase of the Company's evolution as it continues to progress along its path to becoming a mature, established entity, well positioned for long-term, sustainable growth. Following notable achievements for Project Matador across construction, buildout and regulatory milestones, these developments will position Fermi for its next chapter of innovation, operational excellence, and client-focused service.

(d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ: FRMI ) (LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today filed a Current Report on Form 8-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, which includes the fiscal year 2025 shareholder letter as an exhibit. The 8-K and shareholder letter will be available on Fermi America's investor relations website at investor.fermiamerica.com.

items.title: Fermi America™ Secures $165 Million Equipment Financing Facility from CSG Investments, an Affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to Accelerate Delivery of Six SGT-800 Gas Turbines for 2028 Delivery at Project Matador - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior...
items.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior secured, first lien delayed draw term loan from CSG Investments, Inc., an affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to finance the remaining progress payments on its previously ordered six Siemens Energy SGT-800-57 gas turbines, with delivery scheduled in 2028. The Borrower of the facility is Fermi Turbine Warehouse II LLC, a wholly owned special purpose entity of Fermi Inc.

items.title: Fermi America™ Files Second Clean Air Permit Application with TCEQ for 5 GW of Additional Power for Its Project Matador Private Grid - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ today filed an additional 5 GW Clean Air Permit Application...
items.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™ today filed an additional 5 GW Clean Air Permit Application with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ). The filing, made directly on the heels of Project Matador's first approved 6 GW Clean Air Permit last month reflects Fermi's target of ~17 GW of total power including 11 GW of clean natural gas, combined with nuclear energy, solar and battery sources.

items.title: World's Largest Private Grid, Fermi America™ to File Additional 5GW Clean Air Permit for Project Matador with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ) Upsizing Campus Projections to 17GW of Private Power - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System (TTU...
items.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , March 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System (TTU System), today announced its intention to file an additional 5GW Clean Air Permit with the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ). The announcement made right on the heels of Project Matador's first 6GW Clean Air Permit, approved two weeks ago, signals the campus' plan to achieve ~17GW of total power including 11GW of clean natural gas, 4.4GW of nuclear energy, solar and battery sources.

In addition, Carson County leadership approved a 10-year tax abatement and reinvestment zone for Fermi America's 11GW private grid campus, creating new tax revenues, securing local investment, spurring economic growth and long-term, sustainable jobs across the region.

items.title: Alternatives to OpenAI, Anthropic: With US prime AI off the table, India opts for fine China - The Economic Times
items.summary: Chinese open-source models, which were already popular among startups due to lower costs, may now make their way to large enterprises looking to avoid disruptions to top-dollar artificial intelligence projects. “The choice is pragmatic, not political,” said Nipun Kalra, managing director and senior partner at BCG.

NVIDIA Appears Among Top Semiconductor Picks - Let's Data Science
items.summary: For AI infrastructure practitioners and procurement teams, NVIDIA's financial scale is now as consequential as its chip roadmap. Insider Monkey ranks NVIDIA among the top semiconductor stocks held by billionaires, based on Q1 2026 institutional 13-F filings. The core financial data: NVIDIA raised $25 billion in investment-grade bonds on June 15, 2026 -- its first debt issuance since 2021, upsized from an initial $20 billion target -- drawing $85 billion in orders. Fermi America™ and Siemens Energy Execute Letter of Intent for an Additional 1.1 GW (Once in Combined Cycle Mode) of Frame F Class Generation Equipment for 2026 Delivery and Enter Into Nuclear Collaboration as Fermi Continues to Advance its 11-Gig - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System, is announcing two landmark letters of intent with Siemens Energy to secure...
items.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Sept. 25, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi America, in partnership with the Texas Tech University System, is announcing two landmark letters of intent with Siemens Energy to secure 1.1 GW (at ISO conditions once in combined cycle mode) of Frame F Class Generation Equipment for 2026 delivery and collaborate on Siemens' flagship nuclear steam turbine technologies, in support of Fermi's 11-Gigawatt AI campus. "I want to thank President Trump for his strong leadership and action in clearing the path for companies like ours to help America win this race," added Toby Neugebauer , Fermi America CEO and Co-Founder. items.title: Fermi America Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering - PR Newswire
items.summary: /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi America" or the "Company") announced today the pricing of its initial public offering of 32,500,000 shares of its common...
items.excerpt: AMARILLO, Texas , Sept. 30, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Fermi Inc. ("Fermi America" or the "Company") announced today the pricing of its initial public offering of 32,500,000 shares of its common stock at a public offering price of $21.00 per share. In addition, the Company has granted the underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to an additional 4,875,000 shares of its common stock at the initial public offering price, less underwriting discounts and commissions. The shares of the Company's common stock are expected to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on October 1, 2025 and the London Stock Exchange on October 2, 2025 under the ticker symbol "FRMI."
